title: Mautic
description: Open-source marketing automation platform for email campaigns, lead management, landing pages, and multichannel customer journeys.
installation: Mautic only supports MySQL/MariaDB (no Postgres). This template deploys the primary mautic_web container; on first run open the URL and complete the web installer, or rely on the auto-install env vars (set DOCKER_MAUTIC_LOAD_TEST_DATA=false). IMPORTANT: rotate the mariadb password and the MAUTIC_DB_PASSWORD env to match before going to production. For full functionality deploy two companion containers from the SAME image mautic/mautic:5-apache, changing only DOCKER_MAUTIC_ROLE: (1) a worker container with DOCKER_MAUTIC_ROLE=mautic_worker (consumes the Symfony Messenger queues for email sending/processing), and (2) a cron container with DOCKER_MAUTIC_ROLE=mautic_cron (runs scheduled segment/campaign/email cron jobs). All three containers must share the same MAUTIC_DB_* settings and the same persistent volume (/var/www/html). Redis/Valkey can optionally back the Messenger transport and cache for higher throughput but is not required.
